title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Curren Chan...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, wow, wow! Look at all the plushies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hey. Don't you think a super cute plushie is just
perfect for a super cute girl?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hey. Don't you think a super cute plushie is just
perfect for a super cute girl?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I had some of those with me, I think I'd be
waaay cuter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait to see how hard you'll work for
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait to see how hard you'll work for
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
